    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    Checks if a data exists.
    Serializable

    Gets the value of a data.
    byte[]
    DataRegistry.getDataAsBytes(AbstractPersistentData data)
    Gets the value of a data as its primitive type.
    void
    DataRegistry.registerData(AbstractPersistentData data)
    Registers a new data from a class that extends AbstractPersistentData.
    void
    DataRegistry.setData(AbstractPersistentData data)
    Changes the values of a data.
    void
    DataRegistry.unregisterData(AbstractPersistentData data)
    Removes a data from the data container.
